english_text: I work at a convenience store
The hourly wage is ten thousand won
Can I take a day off?
I need to ask for time off

korean_text: 내 대타 좀 서줄 수 있어?
romanization: nae daeta jom seojul su isseo?

english_text: I have to balance work and studies
I learned a lot from this job
I save money from my part-time job
I spend my earnings on food
I work three days a week
I want to quit this job
Finding a part-time job is hard
I am grateful for the experience
I met good people through work
I recommend working at a cafe
Part-time work is a valuable experience
